title: cleome angustifolia subsp. petersiana
intro: Cleome angustifolia subsp. petersiana, also known as Peters' beeplant, is a flowering plant species within the cleome family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Peters' beeplant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, offering benefits like pain relief and immune system support. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
